title: Nycteranthus bijliae
taxonomy: Nycteranthus bijliae belongs to the plant family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the stone plants. This family consists of succulent plants that are native to southern Africa. Nycteranthus bijliae is further classified into the genus Nycteranthus, which is a group of plants that share similar characteristics.
